TreatmentFactorsDecision.title.en: Have you made a decision about whether or not to pursue LP surgery such as tieback for {CmpnName}?

TreatmentFactorsDecision.choices.WILL_PU.en: We will pursue LP surgery such as tieback.

TreatmentFactorsDecision.choices.WILL_NO.en: We've decided not to pursue LP surgery.
TreatmentFactorsDecision.choices.WILL_NO._source: We've decided not to pursue LP surgery.

TreatmentFactorsDecisionStent.title.en: If a veterinarian were to offer a stent implant for LP/GOLPP in your area, would you explore that as a surgery alternative?
TreatmentFactorsDecisionStent.title._source: If a veterinarian were to offer a stent implant for LP/GOLPP in your area, would you explore that as a surgery alternative?

TreatmentFactorsDecisionStent.choices.YE.en: Yes, we would consider a stent implant.

TreatmentFactorsDecisionStent.choices.NO.en: No, we would not consider a stent implant.
TreatmentFactorsDecisionStent.choices.NO._source: No, we would not consider a stent implant.
